THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LA JOLLA COVE INVESTORS, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GILBREATH, DON $300,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $4,470.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $20,926.00 INTEREST, $710.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $326,106.00, DEFENDANT DON GILBREATH SHALL RECEIVE A DOLLAR FOR DOLLAR OFFSET AGAINST THIS JUDGMENT FOR ALL MONEYS RECEIVED BY PLAINTIFF LA JOLLA COVE INVESTORS, INC. PURSUANT TO ITS SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT WITH DEFENDANTS COMCAM INTERNATIONAL, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION AND PETER IANACE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-23-2014 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders balance of case dismissed as to the remaining DOES 1-25 pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE CYNTHIA M. LEE; Clerk KCox; Proceedings not reported. (610)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-03-2013 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Oct-21-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-20-2013 Continued To Oct-16-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Mtn For Default Prove-Up
Off Calendar Jul-25-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Scott F. Handelman, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, La Jolla Cove Investors, Inc.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Don Gilbreath.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-25 dismissed without prejudice.
Travis Huff sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $300,000.00
Pre-Judgment Interest at the annual rate of 4.75%: $20,926.00
Attorney's Fees: $4,470.00
Costs: $710.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $326,106.00
Other: (specify): Defendant Don Gilbreath shall receive a dollar for dollar offset against this judgment for all moneys received by Plaintiff La Jolla Cove Investors, Inc. pursuant to its settlement agreement with Defendants Comcam International, Inc., a Delaware Corporation and Peter Ianace.
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-02-2013 Continued To Sep-04-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-30-2013 Continued To Jul-17-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
